starry_unigraph.backends package

class starry_unigraph.backends.CTDGFeatureRoute(route_type: 'str', world_size: 'int', replicated_memory: 'bool' = True)[source]

Bases: object

describe() → dict[str, Any][source]
exchange(ctx: DistributedContext, node_ids: Tensor, values: Tensor, async_op: bool = False) → tuple[Tensor, Tensor] | AsyncExchangeHandle[source]
replicated_memory: bool = True
route_type: str
world_size: int
class starry_unigraph.backends.CTDGLinkPredictor(num_nodes: int, hidden_dim: int, edge_feat_dim: int, dim_time: int = 100, num_head: int = 2, dropout: float = 0.1, att_dropout: float = 0.1)[source]

Bases: Module

forward(src_conv: Tensor, dst_conv: Tensor, neg_conv: Tensor) → CTDGModelOutput[source]

Defines the computation performed at every call.

Should be overridden by all subclasses.

Note

Although the recipe for forward pass needs to be defined within this function, one should call the Module instance afterwards instead of this since the former takes care of running the registered hooks while the latter silently ignores them.

class starry_unigraph.backends.CTDGMemoryBank(num_nodes: int, hidden_dim: int, device: str, mailbox_slots: int = 1, edge_feat_dim: int = 0, rank: int = 0, world_size: int = 1, async_sync: bool = True)[source]

Bases: object

Per-node memory + K-slot mailbox.

In distributed mode each rank only allocates storage for its own partition (num_local_nodes nodes). Global node IDs are mapped to local IDs via global2local. Nodes not owned by this rank use a temporary CPU buffer (remote_memory) that is filled by async sync operations.

In single-rank mode num_local_nodes == num_nodes and the mapping is the identity, so all existing call sites work unchanged.

async_sync: bool = True
describe() → dict[str, Any][source]
device: str
edge_feat_dim: int = 0
gather(node_ids: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Return memory for global node_ids, placed on self.device.

gather_mailbox(node_ids: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Legacy single-slot gather (slot 0).

hidden_dim: int
property last_update: Tensor
mailbox_slots: int = 1
num_nodes: int
rank: int = 0
read_mailbox(node_ids: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Return K-slot mailbox [M, K, slot_width] on self.device.

read_mailbox_ts(node_ids: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Return mailbox timestamps [M, K] on self.device.

submit_async_mail_sync(ctx: DistributedContext, node_ids: Tensor, mail_slots: Tensor, mail_ts: Tensor) → None[source]

No-op for single rank; distributed path mirrors memory sync.

submit_async_memory_sync(ctx: DistributedContext, node_ids: Tensor, values: Tensor, timestamps: Tensor) → None[source]
sync_updates(ctx, node_ids, values, timestamps)[source]
wait_pending_syncs() → None[source]

Drain pending tensor all_to_all syncs.

world_size: int = 1
write_mailbox(src_ids: Tensor, dst_ids: Tensor, src_mem: Tensor, dst_mem: Tensor, edge_feat: Tensor, timestamps: Tensor) → None[source]

class starry_unigraph.backends.STGraphBlob(state: RNNStateManager)[source]

Bases: object

Sequence of DGL graphs with attached RNN state management.

In training: backed by RNNStateManager (multi-frame, state padding/mixing). In eval/predict: wraps a single graph (dummy state methods).

property current_graph: Any
describe() → dict[str, Any][source]
property flare_is_full_snapshot: bool
property snapshot_index: int
